title: Flex | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Flex

## [Supported versions](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/flex/#supported-versions "Supported versions")

The level of support for a language is defined as follows:

- Fully supported: Analysis will complete. All the language features are understood and examined.
- Supported: Most language features are understood and examined but the version includes unsupported features. Analysis might break or provide incomplete results.

Actionscript 2 and 3: Fully supported

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/flex/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update the Flex-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in the project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **Flex**

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/flex/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [Test coverage](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/test-coverage/overview/ "Test coverage ")
